items.name: theme
items.title: Installer UI theme
items.description: The full Installer UI token sheet — brand + neutral CSS variables (light & dark), type utilities, and keyframes. Install once to theme every component; edit the values in your globals.css to make it yours.

items.name: installer-logomark
items.title: Installer Logomark
items.description: One-shot draw-on logomark with a gradient bloom, for arrival moments. Pure CSS, zero dependencies beyond React.

items.name: installer-loading
items.title: Installer Loading
items.description: Full-page indefinite wait state — a gradient comet endlessly traces the logomark while the fill breathes. Pure CSS, self-contained.

items.name: copilot-mark
items.title: Copilot Mark
items.description: The logomark as a presence indicator — quiet in the text color when idle, a brand-gradient line tracing its own glyph while live.

items.name: catenary-arcs
items.title: Catenary Arcs
items.description: Four nested catenary arches drawing themselves on, outermost first, the innermost in the brand gradient. Pure CSS.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: A seamless, infinitely scrolling strip with edge fade and pause-on-hover. Self-contained scoped CSS, reduced-motion aware.

items.name: brand-button
items.title: Brand Button
items.description: A CTA with a crisp gradient border that lifts and glows on hover; renders as a button or an anchor. Self-contained, brand-token driven.

items.name: animated-number
items.title: Animated Number
items.description: Tasteful numeric ease for figures that change — bring your own formatter; snaps under prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A single-select built on Base UI: a keyboard-nav brand rail on the highlighted row, a persistent tint on the selected one, and a CSS spring open/close.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: A searchable select on Base UI — client or async filtering, clearable, with a searching spinner and skeleton rows. Shares the dropdown grammar.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: An actions menu on Base UI with items, icons, shortcuts, checkbox/radio items, submenus, and a destructive variant — one grammar with Select and Combobox.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: react-day-picker restyled as a real table with ghost month/year selects, brand focus rings, jump-to-today, and a selected-day brand shadow.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: A Base UI popover wrapping the Calendar, with field / pill / inline variants, presets, and a clear affordance.

items.name: chips-input
items.title: Chips Input
items.description: A token / tag input with spring chip enter-exit, Enter/comma commit, Backspace-to-delete, and case-insensitive de-dupe.

items.name: segmented-control
items.title: Segmented Control
items.description: An ARIA radiogroup segmented control with a shared-layout sliding indicator, press feedback, and optional per-segment tooltips.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tabs with a layout-projected sliding underline and crossfade panel transitions, plus per-tab counts, busy dots, and loading skeletons.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: A theme-syncing sonner Toaster plus the toast() function, styled to the Installer surfaces (bottom-right, rich colors, close button).

items.name: score-ring
items.title: Score Ring
items.description: A circular 0–100 indicator in four sizes that spring-fills on mount; state drives the stroke, and an unknown state renders a dashed ring.

items.name: segment-meter
items.title: Segment Meter
items.description: A row of discrete cell meters (battery gauges) with a four-ink grammar — filled, weak alarm, active, and dashed/ghost — plus an assessing sweep.

items.name: confidence-meter
items.title: Confidence Meter
items.description: Calibrated 0–1 confidence as a dense five-segment meter with a tone-coded label and tooltip — reads at a glance next to a chip.
